summary: The `pnpm audit` command detected a moderate XSS vulnerability in the ip-address package (version <=10.1.0), which is a transitive dependency. The audit failed with exit code 1, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: Security vulnerability in transitive dependency ip-address (<=10.1.0) with XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods; patched in version >=10.1.1. Dependency chain: network__fetch > @pnpm/network.agent > @pnpm/network.proxy-agent > socks-proxy-agent > socks > ip-address.

evidence.quote: │ moderate            │ ip-address has XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods   │
evidence.reason: Explicit statement of the vulnerability type and affected package
Confirms audit found at least one vulnerability and failed the job
Shows the pnpm audit command exited with error code 1, causing job failure

suggested_fix: Update the ip-address package to version 10.1.1 or higher. Since ip-address is a transitive dependency, update the upstream packages in the chain (socks, socks-proxy-agent, @pnpm/network.proxy-agent, etc.) to versions that depend on the patched ip-address, or run `pnpm update ip-address@^10.1.1` directly.
